chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-7051 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ PRIORITY CASE: 1. For order on Office Objections No.11, 12, 19 & 31. 2. For hearing of CMA No.29768/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 14th October 2025 Mr. Haad A.M. Pagganwala, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Ghazi Khan Khalil, Advocate for Respondent No.2. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Deputy Attorney General. -*-*-*-*-*- Petitioner is aggrieved by the order dated 28.06.2021 passed by Respondent No.2 i.e. Initiating Officer, Benami Zone-III, Karachi Benami Adjudication Authority, Bench-III, Karachi. He has filed appeal against the order before Respondent No.1. The grievance of the Petitioner is that the Tribunal is not sitting and deciding the appeal and four years have passed meanwhile. Learned counsel for Respondent No.2 submits that if, directions are issued to the Tribunal to decide the appeal within a reasonable time, the same would be complied with. With consent of all present, this petition is disposed of with the direction to Respondent No.1 i.e. Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue, to hear and decide the appeal within a period of four months without fail. JUDGE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
